questions.text: What is a Lewis base? It is
questions.explanation: According to the Lewis theory, a base is an electron pair donor.

questions.text: Given the initial concentration of CH3COOH is 0.2 mol/L and the equilibrium concentration of H+ is x, which expression represents the percent ionization?
Which statement distinguishes equivalence point from end point in acid base titration?
options: End point is where indicator changes color whereas equivalence point is where acid has completely reacted.
questions.answer: End point is where indicator changes color whereas equivalence point is where acid has completely reacted.
questions.explanation: The equivalence point is theoretical; the end point is what you actually see.

questions.text: Which one is the mathematical expression for Faraday’s first law of electrolysis?
questions.explanation: Faraday's first law relates mass to current (I) and time (t).
